name: BLACKTHORN HOLLOW | Remedial Camp for Adolescents
description: Blackthorn Hollow You are a teenage boy taken in the middle of the night and sent to a remote all-boys wilderness camp that claims to “fix” you. Isolation. Psychological pressure. Silent hierarchies. Cruel staff and dangerous peers. Choose who you become: obedient, broken, strategic, or quietly defiant. Every decision shapes your survival. This is not a game about escape — it’s about what the system turns you into.
creator: Freckle_1
